title: Close duplicate issue #64 and fix heartbeat dedup

log.context: Close duplicate issue #64 and fix heartbeat dedup

Both tasks are done.

**Issue #64 closed:** Closed with comment noting it's a duplicate of #62 and #63, both already investigated — normal session cycling, not a crash.

**Script:** `/mnt/data/scripts/heartbeat_ideation.py`

**What was changed:** The `is_duplicate_finding` function already existed but had a bug — the closed-issues check returned `True` for any matching closed issue regardless of age, meaning once an issue about claude-bot failures was ever closed, the finding would be suppressed...(truncated)
